name: SC-001: Successful Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the menu button, and verify the heading Products is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the product inventory page heading is visible.

name: SC-002: Unauthenticated Access Redirects to Login
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in and verify the login form is visible.

name: SC-003: Cart Badge Updates After Adding Product
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, submit the login form, and verify the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.

name: SC-004: Sort by Price Low to High Shows Cheapest First
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible as the first product price.

name: SC-005: Cart Page Lists Added Item Details
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the shopping cart icon, and verify the heading Your Cart is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the cart icon, and verify the heading Your Cart is visible.
